meta.title: AI Short Film: Discarded Companion — A Cinematic Sci-Fi Story
meta.description:
"Discarded Companion" is a cinematic AI short film I made using Kling and Veo 3. I generated character references with Nano Banana for consistency, acted out the dialogue scenes that I brought to life with Kling's Motion Control, and created a voice with ElevenLabs. All the music is Suno. 
Learn how I made this movie: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZrJsckCh5RzRoH5HYNKenRfN2Nc8nhjQ
🚀 Sign up for my course on making cinematic AI films: https://aivideoschool.xyz/

🛠️ AI TOOLS (some links are affiliate links — they help support the channel)
Kling: https://klingaiaffiliate.pxf.io/jeBGnM 
ElevenLabs: https://try.elevenlabs.io/lcol016s31sw    
Suno: https://suno.com/invite/@aivideoschool 
Google Flow: https://labs.google/fx/tools/flow
